ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drug_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug usage record */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare database */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the drug usage data */,
  "drug_group" TEXT /* Group of drugs (e.g., methotrexate, sulfasalazine) */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of patients using the drug */,
  "usage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of patients using the drug */,
  "db_key" TEXT /* Key identifier for the database */,
  "total_patients" INTEGER /* Total number of patients in the database for the given year */,
  "average_dosage" REAL /* Average dosage of the drug used by patients */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_usage_drug_group FOREIGN KEY ("drug_group") REFERENCES drug_groups ("group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_usage_database_name FOREIGN KEY ("database_name") REFERENCES databases ("db_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "db_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare database */,
  "db_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the healthcare database */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the database */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data in the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the database record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("db_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "drug_group" TEXT /* Group of the drug (e.g., methotrexate, sulfasalazine) */,
  "drug_type" TEXT /* Type of the drug (e.g., DMARD, Biologic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drug */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the drug manufacturer */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the drug was approved by regulatory bodies */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the drug record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drugs_drug_type FOREIGN KEY ("drug_type") REFERENCES drug_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drugs_drug_group FOREIGN KEY ("drug_group") REFERENCES drug_groups ("group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Health condition of the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the patient record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_drug_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-drug usage record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the patient started using the drug */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the patient stopped using the drug */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the drug */,
  "prescription_id" TEXT /* ID of the prescription for the drug */,
  "reason_for_use" TEXT /* Reason why the patient is using the drug */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the patient-drug usage record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_drug_usage_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_drug_usage_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drug group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the drug group record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drug type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the drug type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage statistic */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the usage data */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of patients using the drug */,
  "usage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of patients using the drug */,
  "total_patients" INTEGER /* Total number of patients in the database for the given year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the usage statistics record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, clinical) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug usage record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES drug_usage ("usage_id")
)
